SLAYRUNETERRA-DRAGONS_FURY.title: Dragons Fury
SLAYRUNETERRA-DRAGONS_FURY.description: Gain {DragonsFuryStrengthPower:diff()} [gold]Strength[/gold] until the end of your next turn.
SLAYRUNETERRA-CELESTIAL_BLESSING.title: Celestial Blessing
SLAYRUNETERRA-DIVINE_INTERVENTION.title: Divine Intervention
SLAYRUNETERRA-DIVINE_INTERVENTION.descri:
Gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
At the beginning of your next turn, deal {DivineInterventionPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
SLAYRUNETERRA-GREATER_DIVINE_INTERVENTIO:
ALL allies gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
At the beginning of your next turn, deal {DivineInterventionPower:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
